prestazioni: 13B-REW (twin-rotor Wankel) engine ported to Mazdaspeed Group B specifications with 1.3mm apex seal upgrades (Carbonapex) and custom billet eccentric shaft (Ogura Racing) for 350+ hp at 9,500 RPM on VP Racing Q16 fuel

Garrett GT35R turbocharger with 0.86 A/R turbine housing, TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate, and custom 3.5" stainless steel intercooler piping (GReddy Type-RS) with integrated water-methanol injection (Snow Performance Stage 3 kit)

Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom 13B-REW ignition map (developed by Rotary Aviation) paired with AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors and HKS 2618 forged pistons (8.5:1 compression) for sustained boost levels of 18 psi
estetica: Rocket Bunny Savanna GT-specific widebody kit (Pandem V2) with carbon fiber overfenders, custom 3D-printed front splitter (AeroCatch mounts), and rear diffuser (Voltex Type-3) for -120kg downforce at 160 km/h

RE Amemiya GT-II 17x9.5" +25mm offset wheels (bronze finish) wrapped in Yokohama Advan A052 245/40R17 tires, paired with custom polycarbonate side windows (Sparco Lexan) and rear quarter glass delete (JDM-style)

Custom livery by Signal Auto (Tokyo) featuring hand-painted "Savanna GT" script in Mazda Typeface (1980s Group B style), carbon fiber hood (Seibon CF) with functional NACA ducts, and LED taillight conversion (Tomita Auto LED)
